description: TRRB ICE/DHS V43 nationwide 72-lane rotating public-source registry

query_lanes.label: ICE headquarters official
query_lanes.query: from:ICEgov -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: DHS official immigration enforcement
query_lanes.query: from:DHSgov (ICE OR immigration OR deportation OR removal OR detention OR enforcement OR arrested) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: CBP official immigration enforcement
query_lanes.query: from:CBP (immigration OR removal OR deportation OR detention OR arrested OR enforcement OR BorderPatrol) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: HSI headquarters official
query_lanes.query: from:HSI_HQ (arrest OR arrested OR detention OR operation OR investigation OR smuggling OR trafficking) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: DOJ immigration enforcement
query_lanes.query: from:TheJusticeDept (ICE OR HSI OR immigration OR alien OR smuggling OR deportation OR removal OR reentry) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: Federal enforcement partners
query_lanes.query: (from:USMarshalsHQ OR from:FBI OR from:DEAHQ OR from:ATFHQ) (ICE OR HSI OR immigration OR alien OR deportation OR smuggling) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: ERO core operations
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR ERO OR "Enforcement and Removal Operations") (arrest OR arrested OR detained OR fugitive OR removal OR deported) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Major immigration enforcement operations
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR DHS OR HSI OR ERO) (operation OR sweep OR raid OR task force OR warrant) (arrest OR detained OR removal) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Northeast ICE reports
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR "immigration agents" OR HSI OR ERO) (arrest OR detained OR raid OR operation OR deportation) (New York OR New Jersey OR Boston OR Philadelphia OR Baltimore OR Newark OR Buffalo) -is:retweet lang:en
